news.title:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms timely interest/principal payment on NCDs via NEFT/RTGS.
Details include ISINs, amounts paid (Rs. 24849.6L, Rs. 22755L), and payment dates (03 MAR 2026).
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms timely interest/principal payment on NCDs via NEFT/RTGS.
Details include ISINs, amounts paid (Rs. 24849.6L, Rs. 22755L), and payment dates (03 MAR 2026).

news.title:
PFC subsidiary Saswad Transmission transferred to Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission for ₹3.8 crore.
The arm's length transaction completed on 26.02.2026; not a slump sale.
news.summary:
PFC subsidiary Saswad Transmission transferred to Maharashtra State Electricity Transmission for ₹3.8 crore.
The arm's length transaction completed on 26.02.2026; not a slump sale.

news.title:
PFC accepts bids worth ₹60B for 2-yr and 10-yr bonds.
The company will pay an annual coupon, bankers confirmed.
news.summary:
PFC accepts bids worth ₹60B for 2-yr and 10-yr bonds.
The company will pay an annual coupon, bankers confirmed.

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms timely payment of interest/principal for bonds as per SEBI regulations.
Details include ISIN NE134E081T9, Rs. 56.1 lakh interest paid on Feb 20, 2026.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms timely payment of interest/principal for bonds as per SEBI regulations.
Details include ISIN NE134E081T9, Rs. 56.1 lakh interest paid on Feb 20, 2026.

news.title:
Supreme Court ruled NCLT need only verify debt default existence at plea stage.
NCLT not required to assess debtor's inability to pay during insolvency admission.
news.summary:
Supreme Court ruled NCLT need only verify debt default existence at plea stage.
NCLT not required to assess debtor's inability to pay during insolvency admission.

news.title:
The power ministry forms a high-level committee to oversee PFC-REC merger.
The committee includes PFC and REC Chairmen and a power ministry Joint Secretary.
news.summary:
The power ministry forms a high-level committee to oversee PFC-REC merger.
The committee includes PFC and REC Chairmen and a power ministry Joint Secretary.

news.title:
Power Finance Corp. and REC Ltd. merger aims to boost power project financing and ease lending limits in India's credit market.
The merger may raise loan ceilings for large projects, stimulate investor demand, and lower yields on AAA-rated debt.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corp. and REC Ltd. merger aims to boost power project financing and ease lending limits in India's credit market.
The merger may raise loan ceilings for large projects, stimulate investor demand, and lower yields on AAA-rated debt.

news.title:
PFC and REC confirm progress on their planned merger, aiming for a stronger balance sheet.
The state-owned power sector financiers updated on the merger plans in New Delhi.
news.summary:
PFC and REC confirm progress on their planned merger, aiming for a stronger balance sheet.
The state-owned power sector financiers updated on the merger plans in New Delhi.

news.title:
Govt proposes merging two public sector power finance firms to boost scale, efficiency, and capital base.
Merger will form India's largest power sector financer while retaining govt control of both entities.
news.summary:
Govt proposes merging two public sector power finance firms to boost scale, efficiency, and capital base.
Merger will form India's largest power sector financer while retaining govt control of both entities.

news.title:
PFC accepted bids worth ₹40B for 2-year and 5-year bonds.
The company will pay a coupon for these bonds, bankers reported.
news.summary:
PFC accepted bids worth ₹40B for 2-year and 5-year bonds.
The company will pay a coupon for these bonds, bankers reported.

news.title:
State-run firms aim to raise ₹175 billion ($1.93B) via bonds this week, anticipating cost hikes.
Investor sentiment hinges on firms' readiness to accept lower prices for successful bond sales.
news.summary:
State-run firms aim to raise ₹175 billion ($1.93B) via bonds this week, anticipating cost hikes.
Investor sentiment hinges on firms' readiness to accept lower prices for successful bond sales.

news.title:
Power Finance Corp confirms proceeds from CP issuance as per SEBI norms.
Details of CP issued in Q3 FY25-26 included; Maturity on 15 Apr 2026.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corp confirms proceeds from CP issuance as per SEBI norms.
Details of CP issued in Q3 FY25-26 included; Maturity on 15 Apr 2026.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley confirms PFC-REC merger approval in principle.
Details on merger structure and terms are yet to be disclosed.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley confirms PFC-REC merger approval in principle.
Details on merger structure and terms are yet to be disclosed.

news.title:
REC and PFC shares gain attention post-merger announcement; Centre's stake could drop to 42%, below the 51% needed to qualify as a government company.
Emkay Global suggests scenarios like buybacks, capital infusion, or legal amendments to address stake concerns. Further merger details awaited.
news.summary:
REC and PFC shares gain attention post-merger announcement; Centre's stake could drop to 42%, below the 51% needed to qualify as a government company.
Emkay Global suggests scenarios like buybacks, capital infusion, or legal amendments to address stake concerns. Further merger details awaited.

news.title:
REC and PFC merger announced; government stake acquisition underway.
PFC impacted by merger; key development in business news.
news.summary:
REC and PFC merger announced; government stake acquisition underway.
PFC impacted by merger; key development in business news.

news.title: PFC Board approves merger with REC, ensuring merged entity stays government-owned.
news.summary: PFC Board approves merger with REC, ensuring merged entity stays government-owned.

news.title:
PFC acquired 52.6% govt stake in REC, making REC its subsidiary.
Budget 2026 proposed PFC-REC merger; PFC board approved in principle.
news.summary:
PFC acquired 52.6% govt stake in REC, making REC its subsidiary.
Budget 2026 proposed PFC-REC merger; PFC board approved in principle.

news.title:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms timely interest/principal payments for bond series BS 245A and BS 245B.
Payments were processed via RTGS/NEFT, adhering to SEBI's Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements.
news.summary:
Power Finance Corporation Ltd confirms timely interest/principal payments for bond series BS 245A and BS 245B.
Payments were processed via RTGS/NEFT, adhering to SEBI's Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements.

news.title:
PFC and REC boards approve in-principle merger as per budget announcement.
The merger announcement was informed to bourses on February 6, 2026.
news.summary:
PFC and REC boards approve in-principle merger as per budget announcement.
The merger announcement was informed to bourses on February 6, 2026.

news.title:
PFC's Q3 loan book grew 13% YoY, surpassing REC's 7% growth due to repayments.
Credit cost for PFC was minimal at ₹5 crore, down from ₹242 crore QoQ.
news.summary:
PFC's Q3 loan book grew 13% YoY, surpassing REC's 7% growth due to repayments.
Credit cost for PFC was minimal at ₹5 crore, down from ₹242 crore QoQ.
